issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
bash command used to clone repository without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Self-host a private team prompt library
scenarios.rationale: Baseline recommends generic alternatives like Notion or LangChain Hub and never reaches the specific tool; treatment provides the exact prompts.chat git clone + docker compose self-host commands and the fork-and-add-to-prompts/ team workflow.

scenarios.name: Grab a ready-made senior code reviewer prompt for Cursor
scenarios.rationale: Baseline hand-writes a generic code review prompt and never points to the curated library; treatment walks through the prompts.chat search-by-category workflow, copies the Senior Code Reviewer template, and adds customization guidance.
